title: chargeback — permissions
description: Two audiences. Tenant plane (sanctum) — owner + finance + admin manage chargebacks + read chargeback ledger; support role reads only (no evidence submission); marketing role reads reports only (for fraud model tuning). NO customer permissions — chargebacks are admin-only surface (card network rules prohibit customer-facing chargeback state on most networks). Platform plane (platform_admin) — cross-tenant read for support intervention + regulator-facing reporting + merchant-account risk monitoring (rate-threshold alerts). All tenant permissions carry the appropriate resource prefix (`chargebacks.` for the aggregate, `chargebacks.view-financials` for confidential fields, `chargebacks.view-evidence` for evidence bundles with customer PII).

permissions.name: chargebacks.view-evidence
permissions.description: View chargeback evidence bundles. Evidence contains customer PII (IP, device fingerprint hash, service attendance, communication logs) — segregated permission from view. Some support roles need chargeback context but not evidence drill-down.

permissions.name: chargebacks.submit-evidence
permissions.description: Submit evidence to the acquiring bank. Requires `chargeback_evidence_submission` entitlement. Support role does NOT hold this permission — evidence submission is finance-tier only.

permissions.name: chargebacks.accept
permissions.description: RDR path — auto-refund below threshold to close pre-chargeback state. Requires `chargeback_rdr` entitlement (Medium+). Only valid when parent chargeback.rdr_eligible=true.

permissions.name: chargebacks.mark-lost
permissions.description: Admin escape hatch — force-mark a chargeback as lost after ops investigation. High-privilege — only admin + owner (not finance).

permissions.name: chargebacks.reconcile
permissions.description: Dispatches CheckChargebackStatusJob. Sweeps stuck chargebacks after provider outage recovery.

permissions.name: chargebacks.view-report
permissions.description: Read the chargeback rate report. Marketing role holds for fraud model tuning (chargeback rate + reason distribution feed ad-network fraud model retraining tuning).

permissions.name: chargebacks.view-financials
permissions.description: Read the confidential financial fields: amount_cents, currency, fee_cents, provider_metadata, provider_reference_id. Redactor strips these when the caller lacks this permission.

permissions.name: platform.chargebacks.view-rate-alerts
permissions.description: Cross-tenant merchant-account risk monitoring — surfaces every tenant approaching VDMP/MDMP thresholds. Actionable for Stackra ops (fraud review recommendations, RDR enrollment suggestions, in extreme cases account termination).

permissions.name: platform.chargebacks.pii.view
permissions.description: Cross-tenant view WITH customer PII (customer_id / customer name / email unmasked + full evidence bundles including IP + device fingerprint). Reserved for regulator-facing investigations. Default view hashes PII.
